title: NATO members feel the heat from the Iran war, but the bar for the bloc to act is high
summary_full: NATO's members with assets within firing range of Iran, are feeling the heat from the escalating war in the Middle East.
summary_public: NATO's members with assets within firing range of Iran, are feeling the heat from the escalating war in the Middle East.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: NATO members feel the heat from the Iran war
